quick_skim.title: ARTA: Adaptive Reinforcement-Learning-Based Throttling Agent for RowHammer Vulnerabilities
quick_skim.abstract: RowHammer vulnerability continues to intensify with DRAM scaling, reducing the activation threshold needed to induce bitflips and rendering existing defenses such as TRR, ECC, and refresh-based mechanisms vulnerable to sophisticated multi-bank hammering patterns. This work presents ARTA, a lightweight reinforcement-learning-based throttling mechanism that detects and suppresses RowHammer activity by monitoring fine-grained memory access behavior within the DRAM refresh window (t_REFW) and dynamically adjusting core throughput using a Q-learning frequency scaling governor. ARTA requires no DRAM-side hardware modification or offline training, using small SRAM structures in the memory controller -- a per-core, per-bank FIFO queue (CBF) and a compact Q-table -- for immediate deployment. Our evaluation shows that ARTA eliminates all bitflips at N_BO values down to 64, reduces bitflips up to 22K times at N_BO of 20, and improves performance up to 73.6% over state-of-the-art mitigation mechanisms by limiting preventive action overheads for improved memory bandwidth throughput. These results demonstrate that adaptive RL-based throttling provides robust, scalable, and high-performance RowHammer mitigation for emerging DRAM systems.
quick_skim.llm_evidence_en: RL-based throttling agent for detecting RowHammer vulnerabilities in DRAM
quick_skim.llm_evidence_cn: 基于强化学习的节流机制，用于检测DRAM中的RowHammer漏洞
quick_skim.llm_evidence: 基于强化学习的节流机制，用于检测DRAM中的RowHammer漏洞
quick_skim.canonical_evidence: 基于强化学习的节流机制，用于检测DRAM中的RowHammer漏洞
quick_skim.llm_tldr_en: ARTA uses Q-learning to dynamically throttle memory access and detect RowHammer attacks without hardware modification, achieving high detection accuracy with low overhead.
quick_skim.llm_tldr_cn: 针对DRAM缩放导致的RowHammer漏洞加剧问题，本文提出ARTA，一种轻量级强化学习节流机制。该方法通过Q学习频率缩放调节器监控内存访问行为，在DRAM刷新窗口内检测并抑制RowHammer活动。实验表明，ARTA无需DRAM侧硬件修改或离线训练，能有效应对多存储体攻击模式。这项工作为硬件安全提供了一种自适应的AI驱动解决方案。
quick_skim.llm_tldr: 针对DRAM缩放导致的RowHammer漏洞加剧问题，本文提出ARTA，一种轻量级强化学习节流机制。该方法通过Q学习频率缩放调节器监控内存访问行为，在DRAM刷新窗口内检测并抑制RowHammer活动。实验表明，ARTA无需DRAM侧硬件修改或离线训练，能有效应对多存储体攻击模式。这项工作为硬件安全提供了一种自适应的AI驱动解决方案。
